title: Pulsar
description: a boring library mod used across constellation mods.
body:
# Pulsar

**This mod does not add any content by itself!**

Pulsar is a monolithic library/utility mod used by [Andromeda](https://modrinth.com/mod/andromeda). It is a successor to Dark Matter, in attempt to migrate to an easier to maintain system and mojmap.

Unlike Dark Matter, Pulsar is meant to be downloaded separately, and attempts to provide a more stable API.

Pulsar provides utility classes, more lax Item Group API, Mixin tools, Fake ClientLevel, a GUI particles API and more!
